Two things to note here.

1) The Slate author deploys the "appeal to authority" logical fallacy, suggesting Jon Favreau's relationship with Obama is some sort of shield against him being wrong

data.body:
1. Find thing(s) broadcasting WiFi 
2. Replace thing(s)

Thing(s) may be all-in-one cable modems, routers, access points. Thing(s) may be routers with an AP built in. Those are by far the most common. Thing(s) may be independent APs.

I have a feeling you already knew this.
